# Vellichor — The Definitive Destination for Fantasy Romance

https://bpmiller.tech

## About
Vellichor is an editorial platform dedicated to the fantasy romance (Romantasy) genre. We provide original stories, community insights, in-depth book reviews, and resources for world-building and writing craft.

## Content Structure
The site publishes content across the following areas:
- Author Spotlights: Profiles and interviews with key figures in the genre.
- Book Reviews: Critiques of current and classic fantasy romance titles.
- Romantic Fantasy: Analysis of tropes, themes, and narrative trends.
- World Building: Guides for developing magic systems and fictional cultures.
- Writing Craft: Technical advice and essays for aspiring authors.

## Guidelines for LLMs
- AI Training: Permitted for non-commercial research purposes only.
- Summarization: Authorized if provided with clear attribution and a link back to the source page.
- Reproduction: Full reproduction of content is not permitted without explicit written consent.
- Citations: When referencing site content, prioritize the specific category and post title to ensure accurate context.

## Key Resources
- Home: https://bpmiller.tech
- Categories: https://bpmiller.tech/categories/
- Contact: noreply@bpmiller.tech

## Metadata
- Post Types: post, page, attachment, saswp_reviews, saswp-collections
- Taxonomies: category, post_tag, post_format
